subject: Import files from AreTomo
body:
Hi all,
Hi have an issue with importing my mdoc and mrc files into Warp (Windows) 
after doing alignment with AreTomo. When I go to "Import tilt series from 
Imod" and I specify my mdoc folder with my mdoc file inside everything 
seems fine, but when I specify my mrc folder, Warp says "no movies found". 
It seems that this issue has been already mentioned here some time ago so I 
have followed a few suggestions and changed the ImageFile and SubFramePath 
in the mdoc file, but sill without any positive outcome. My mdoc file 
(TS_037.mdoc, in /path to tiltseries/TS_037/mdoc/) looks like this:

PixelSpacing = 1.112
Voltage = 300
Version = SerialEM Version 4.1.13 64-bit,  built Jun 27 2024  00:15:33
ImageFile = TS_037.mrc
ImageSize = 5760 4092
DataMode = 1

[T = SerialEM: Titan Krios D3665 at MPI Biophysics           16-Aug-24 
 01:39:25    ]

[T =     Tilt axis angle = 84.0, binning = 1  spot = 5  camera = 2 dosym = 
0.0]

[ZValue = 0]
MinMaxMean = 0 647 29.6052
TiltAngle = -60.0081
StagePosition = 741.477 -533.633
StageZ = 96.1799
Magnification = 81000
Intensity = 0.23652
ExposureDose = 3.0866
DoseRate = 4.53268
PixelSpacing = 1.112
SpotSize = 5
ProbeMode = 0
Defocus = 4.38167
ImageShift = -0.0526093 0.833121
RotationAngle = 174
ExposureTime = 0.213049
Binning = 1
CameraIndex = 2
DividedBy2 = 0
OperatingMode = 1
UsingCDS = 0
MagIndex = 30
LowDoseConSet = 4
CountsPerElectron = 32
TargetDefocus = -3
PriorRecordDose = 123.139
SubFramePath = /path to tiltseries/TS_037/mrc/TS_037_01.mrc
NumSubFrames = 10
FrameDosesAndNumber = 0.30866 10
DateTime = 16-Aug-24  01:39:24
NavigatorLabel = 224
FilterSlitAndLoss = 20 0
UncroppedSize = -5760 -4092
RotationAndFlip = 6
TimeStamp = 145931964

My mrc folder (/path to tiltseries/TS_037/mrc/) has all the tilt images 
belonging to the tilt series, and are named as TS_037_XX.mrc, where XX is 
01,02, and so forth.

If someone could provide a clue about what is wrong I would really 
appreciate. 
Thanks,
Luis
